content.problemStatement: Write a C program to print $
content.outputFormat: Print a single dollar sign ($) followed by a newline.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the required dollar sign followed by a newline.
Repeated example confirming the same correct output.
Another identical example confirming the output.

solution.approach: The task does not require any computation or input processing. The program simply prints the character '$' and a newline. This satisfies the problem statement directly.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – constant time to output the character.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only constant extra space is used.
